parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Normalize Request').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'n8n mulai memproses job produksi video.', progress: 5, executionId: $execution.id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify((() => {
  const req = $('Normalize Request').first().json;
  const schema = {
    narasi: 'Narasi bahasa Indonesia yang natural, storytelling kuat, ada hook awal dan closing bernilai.',
    video_prompts: ['English cinematic prompt per clip, photorealistic, no text overlay'],
    judul: ['Judul YouTube utama', 'Alternatif 2', 'Alternatif 3'],
    judul_tiktok: 'Judul TikTok viral',
    caption_facebook: 'Caption Facebook interaktif',
    deskripsi: 'Deskripsi YouTube SEO friendly',
    tags: ['tag1', 'tag2', 'tag3'],
    thumbnail_prompt: 'YouTube thumbnail prompt 16:9 high contrast',
    character_anchor: req.characterAnchor,
    negative_prompt: req.characterNegativePrompt
  };

  const promptLines = [
    'You are an expert Indonesian storyteller and creative director for short videos.',
    'Return STRICT JSON only. No markdown. No extra text.',
    `Main topic: ${req.title}`,
    `Description: ${req.prompt}`,
    `Category: ${req.category}`,
    `Visual style: ${req.style}`,
    `Mood: ${req.mood}`,
    `Clip count: ${req.clipCount}`,
    `Clip duration: ${req.clipDuration} seconds`,
    `Series ID: ${req.seriesId}`,
    `Episode number: ${req.episodeNumber}`,
    `Character anchor (must stay identical in all clips): ${req.characterAnchor}`,
    `Negative prompt (must be avoided): ${req.characterNegativePrompt}`,
    'Rules:',
    '- Narration must be in natural Indonesian and emotionally engaging.',
    '- video_prompts must be in English.',
    '- Every video prompt must preserve the same exact character identity.',
    '- Keep face, age range, hairstyle, and skin tone consistent across all clips.',
    '- Keep wardrobe and color palette mostly consistent unless scene context forces small change.',
    '- Avoid text overlays, logos, and watermarks.',
    'Output schema:',
    JSON.stringify(schema, null, 2)
  ];

  return {
    model: req.ollamaModel,
    prompt: promptLines.join('\n'),
    stream: false,
    format: 'json',
    options: { temperature: 0.45, top_p: 0.9, num_predict: 6144 }
  };
})()) }}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
set -e
JOB_DIR="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.jobDir }}"
NARASI_PATH="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.narasiPath }}"
NARASI_TXT="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.narasiTxtPath }}"
TTS_VOICE="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.ttsVoice }}"
NARASI_B64="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.narasiB64 }}"

echo "[TTS] Menulis narasi ke file..."
echo "$NARASI_B64" | base64 -d > "$NARASI_TXT"

echo "[TTS] Voice: $TTS_VOICE"
echo "[TTS] Output: $NARASI_PATH"

edge-tts --file "$NARASI_TXT" --voice "$TTS_VOICE" --write-media "$NARASI_PATH"

if [ -f "$NARASI_PATH" ]; then
  duration=$(ffprobe -v quiet -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$NARASI_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  echo "TTS_OK"
  echo "AUDIO_PATH:$NARASI_PATH"
  echo "AUDIO_DURATION:$duration"
else
  echo "[TTS ERROR] File audio tidak ditemukan"
  exit 1
fi

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Normalize Request').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'Narasi audio berhasil dibuat, mulai generate video clips.', progress: 30 }) }}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
set -e
CLIPS_DIR="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.clipsDir }}"
PROMPTS_B64="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.promptsB64 }}"
CHARACTER_ANCHOR_B64="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.characterAnchorB64 }}"
NEGATIVE_PROMPT_B64="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.negativePromptB64 }}"
CLIP_DURATION={{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.clipDuration }}
HF_TOKEN="{{ $('Normalize Request').first().json.huggingfaceToken }}"
JOBID="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.jobId }}"
SEED_BASE={{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.characterSeed }}
REFERENCE_IMAGE_URL="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.characterRefImageUrl }}"
CONSISTENCY_STRENGTH={{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.consistencyStrength }}

echo "[CLIPS] Mendekode daftar prompts..."
echo "$PROMPTS_B64" | base64 -d > /root/.n8n-files/vidgen_${JOBID}_prompts.json
CHARACTER_ANCHOR=$(echo "$CHARACTER_ANCHOR_B64" | base64 -d || true)
NEGATIVE_PROMPT=$(echo "$NEGATIVE_PROMPT_B64" | base64 -d || true)

echo "[CLIPS] Mulai generate klip di: $CLIPS_DIR"

echo "[CLIPS] seed base: $SEED_BASE"

python3 /opt/vidgen/generate_clips.py \
  --clips-dir "$CLIPS_DIR" \
  --prompts-file "/root/.n8n-files/vidgen_${JOBID}_prompts.json" \
  --hf-token "$HF_TOKEN" \
  --clip-duration "$CLIP_DURATION" \
  --seed-base "$SEED_BASE" \
  --character-anchor "$CHARACTER_ANCHOR" \
  --negative-prompt "$NEGATIVE_PROMPT" \
  --reference-image-url "$REFERENCE_IMAGE_URL" \
  --consistency-strength "$CONSISTENCY_STRENGTH"

CLIP_COUNT=$(ls "$CLIPS_DIR"/clip_*.mp4 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "CLIPS_GENERATED:$CLIP_COUNT"
echo "CLIPS_DIR:$CLIPS_DIR"
echo "CLIPS_OK"

=#!/bin/bash
set -e
JOB_DIR="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.jobDir }}"
CLIPS_DIR="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.clipsDir }}"
FILELIST="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.filelistPath }}"
AUDIO="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.audio_path }}"
RAW="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.rawVideoPath }}"
FINAL="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.finalVideoPath }}"
SHORT="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.shortVideoPath }}"
SRT="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.jobDir }}/subs.srt"

# Buat filelist
> "$FILELIST"
for f in $(ls "$CLIPS_DIR"/clip_*.mp4 2>/dev/null | sort); do
  [ -s "$f" ] && echo "file '$f'" >> "$FILELIST"
done

CLIP_COUNT=$(wc -l < "$FILELIST")
if [ "$CLIP_COUNT" -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "[FFMPEG ERROR] Tidak ada klip yang ditemukan di $CLIPS_DIR"
  exit 1
fi
echo "[FFMPEG] $CLIP_COUNT klip ditemukan"

# Step 1: Concat clips
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "$FILELIST" \
  -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 23 -r 24 \
  -vf scale=480:852 "$RAW" 2>&1

# Step 2: Merge audio and BURN SUBTITLES
# Masukkan gaya subtitle yang bold (Yellow with black border)
ffmpeg -y -stream_loop -1 -i "$RAW" -i "$AUDIO" \
  -vf "subtitles='$SRT':force_style='Alignment=2,FontSize=20,PrimaryColour=&H00FFFF,OutlineColour=&H000000,BorderStyle=3'" \
  -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 22 \
  -c:a aac -b:a 128k \
  -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 \
  -shortest -movflags +faststart "$FINAL" 2>&1

# Step 3: Create short preview
ffmpeg -y -i "$FINAL" -t 60 \
  -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 22 \
  -c:a aac -b:a 128k \
  -movflags +faststart "$SHORT" 2>&1

FINAL_SIZE=$(du -sh "$FINAL" | cut -f1)
FINAL_DUR=$(ffprobe -v quiet -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$FINAL" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

echo "FFMPEG_OK"
echo "FINAL_VIDEO:$FINAL"
echo "FINAL_SIZE:$FINAL_SIZE"
echo "FINAL_DURATION:$FINAL_DUR"

=#!/bin/bash
set -e
cp "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.finalVideoPath }}" "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}/final.mp4"
cp "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.shortVideoPath }}" "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}/short.mp4"
if [ -f "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.thumbPath }}" ]; then
  cp "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.thumbPath }}" "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}/thumb.jpg"
fi
chmod -R 755 "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}"
echo "PUBLIC_OK"
echo "PUBLIC_FINAL:{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.finalVideoUrl }}"
echo "PUBLIC_SHORT:{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.shortVideoUrl }}"
